title: biauricula ciliata
intro: Biauricula ciliata, also known as the hairy foxglove or beard foxglove, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Biauricula ciliata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Biauricula ciliata often involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal properties.
